//: A payment provider, described rather than coded. Point
LULAN_PAYMENT_PROVIDER at this file to use it. Secrets are NEVER in
here: fields name environment variables and the values are read from
Built-in presets need none of this — LULAN_PAYMENT_PROVIDER=stripe
plus the two secrets is a complete integration. Copy this file when
your provider is not one of them.
name: acme-pay
//auth: bearer | basic | header | none. Secrets come from env.
//encoding: json (default) or form, for the request bodies below.

//fields: Dotted keys nest in JSON mode. A value that is exactly
{amount_minor} is sent as a number; everything else as a string.
create_intent.//pointers: RFC 6901 pointers into the provider's response.
create_intent.//idempotency_header: Optional: the order id is sent here so the PSP dedupes our retries.

//: Omit signature_header entirely if the provider does not sign its
callbacks — Lulan then requires an integration API key on the
webhook endpoint instead, rather than trusting an open one.
//header_format: raw       — the header value IS the digest (most providers).
key_value — comma-separated k=v pairs, Stripe-style. Several
signature entries may appear during key rotation; any
//tolerance_seconds: Reject signatures older than this when a timestamp is available,
so a captured callback cannot be replayed forever. 0 disables it;
only meaningful with a header format that carries a timestamp.
//events: Everything authentic but unlisted is acknowledged with 200 and
ignored, so the provider stops retrying without moving the order.
